maneuvers.instruction: Walk northeast on Rua São José.
maneuvers.verbal_succinct_transition_instruction: Walk northeast. Then, in 30 meters, Turn right onto Rua 7 de Setembro.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Walk northeast on Rua São José. Then, in 30 meters, Turn right onto Rua 7 de Setembro.

maneuvers.instruction: Turn right onto Rua 7 de Setembro.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Turn right onto Rua 7 de Setembro.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Turn right onto Rua 7 de Setembro.

maneuvers.instruction: Turn left onto Rua Namy Deeke.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Turn left onto Rua Namy Deeke.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Turn left onto Rua Namy Deeke.

maneuvers.instruction: Keep right to stay on Rua Namy Deeke.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Keep right to stay on Rua Namy Deeke.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Keep right to stay on Rua Namy Deeke. Then Turn right onto Rua XV de Novembro.

maneuvers.instruction: Turn right onto Rua XV de Novembro.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Turn right onto Rua XV de Novembro.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Turn right onto Rua XV de Novembro.

maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Turn left onto Rua Professor José Ferreira da Silva.

maneuvers.instruction: Turn left onto Avenida Presidente Castelo Branco.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Turn left onto Avenida Presidente Castelo Branco.
maneuvers.verbal_succinct_transition_instruction: Turn left. Then Turn right onto the walkway.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Turn left onto Avenida Presidente Castelo Branco. Then Turn right onto the walkway.
